suppress.notes: False positive — OWASP incorrectly matches opentelemetry-semconv version numbers against OpenTelemetry core CVEs. The semconv artifact is a separate library containing only semantic convention constants, not the affected core components. Reviewed on 2026-05-02. Revisit if a semconv-specific CVE is published.
False positive — same reasoning as above. Reviewed on 2026-05-02.
